task_completion.description: At least 10 linear measurements are taken on the skull
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius interface, multiple measurement lines (at least 10) with distance values (>= 15 mm) are visible on the 2D slices or 3D skull model.

task_completion.description: Maximum cranial length, breadth, and height are measured
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement lines corresponding to maximum cranial length (front to back), breadth (side to side), and height (bottom to top) are visible on the skull in InVesalius.

task_completion.description: Bilateral measurements are taken on the skull
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement lines are visible on corresponding structures on both the left and right sides of the skull.

task_completion.description: The 3D bone surface is exported as an STL file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'skull_surface.stl' is visible in the file manager or terminal in the '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_case' directory.

task_completion.description: Screenshots of Norma frontalis, lateralis, and verticalis are saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Files named 'norma_frontalis.png', 'norma_lateralis.png', and 'norma_verticalis.png' are visible in the file manager or terminal in the '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_case' directory.
A file named 'forensic_analysis.inv3' is visible in the file manager or terminal in the '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_case' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the InVesalius application interface to take measurements and export files, rather than using terminal commands to create dummy files.

integrity.description: Measurements are genuinely drawn on the skull model
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines must be visually anchored to anatomical points on the 3D or 2D skull model in InVesalius, not just typed text or edited images.

integrity.description: Screenshots correspond to actual 3D views of the skull
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved PNG files or the process of saving them should show genuine 3D views of the skull (front, side, top) generated by InVesalius.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires at least 10 measurements, each >= 15.0 mm.
